availability_assumptions.available_ts_rule: feature.available_ts = current BBO input row available_ts
availability_assumptions.lookback_rule: spread zscore uses only BBO rows with available_ts <= output.available_ts
availability_assumptions.missingness_rule: missing_bbo and bbo_quarantined rows are not forward-filled or interpolated
availability_assumptions.point_in_time_rule: quality flags are evaluated at the exact output available_ts

data_requirements.dataset_scope: requires a future accepted BBO DatasetVersion or canonical BBO input view before materialization

duplicate_or_equivalent_exposure_notes.summary: P13 locked FeaturePack inventory checked; no locked BBO FeaturePack member or BBO DatasetVersion binding covers this P15 gap item.

formula_sketch.quote_rule: use canonical BBO top-book rows only; missing and quarantined quotes are flags or gaps, never filled
formula_sketch.usage_boundary: confirmation and risk-control context only; no tradability or execution claim
